testcase.name: test_vague_goal_returns_discovery

failure.message: AssertionError: discovery ack should contain a question mark; got: 'You want to grow your business. To give you the right guidance, I need a bit more context:' assert '?' in 'You want to grow your business. To give you the right guidance, I need a bit more context:'

testcase.failure: tests/test_cortex_iter16.py:64: in test_vague_goal_returns_discovery assert "?" in ack, f"discovery ack should contain a question mark; got: {ack!r}" E AssertionError: discovery ack should contain a question mark; got: 'You want to grow your business. To give you the right guidance, I need a bit more context:' E assert '?' in 'You want to grow your business. To give you the right guidance, I need a bit more context:'
